summary: Completed Phase 3 testing of FightJudge Pro Dynamic Ticket Pricing feature. Backend API tests: 50/50 passed (100%). Frontend testing successful with all new Dynamic Pricing features working correctly. All existing features remain functional with no regressions detected.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@fightpromo.com / Admin123!)
Ticketing page loads with event selector and 3 tabs (Buy Tickets, Pricing Intelligence, Purchase History)
Event selection loads dynamic pricing with all 4 packages (General, VIP, Ringside, PPV)
Dynamic pricing shows base_price, dynamic_price, multiplier, and 3 factors (scarcity, urgency, velocity)
Pricing Intelligence tab displays pricing overview table with all 7 columns
Sales Analytics section shows stats (total sold: 0, revenue: $0, capacity: 5000, utilization: 0%)
AI Pricing Recommendations button accessible and functional
Purchase History tab shows correct empty state
All 4 ticket packages have functional Buy Now buttons
Backend API: GET /api/tickets/dynamic-pricing/{event_id} returns correct pricing structure
Backend API: GET /api/tickets/sales-analytics/{event_id} returns analytics data
Backend API: POST /api/ai/pricing-recommendations accessible and working
Dashboard loads correctly with all 8 stat cards including new metrics
All existing navigation items working (Events, Fighters, Sponsors, etc.)
No regressions in existing Phase 1 and Phase 2 features
Dynamic pricing algorithm correctly calculates factors for past events (urgency=1.0x as expected)
Pricing Intelligence dashboard with charts and revenue analytics working
Session management working correctly (expires during extended testing as expected)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (50/50 tests passed including new dynamic pricing endpoints)
success_percentage.existing_features: 100% (no regressions detected in Phase 1 and Phase 2 features)
